emails.subject: Annual Summary Report Request
emails.body:
Hi Alice,

Could you please set up the annual summary report for our workspace? We need a new "reports" folder created in the workspace directory, and inside it, a file called "summary.txt" that contains our annual summary text.

The content should simply be: Annual summary

This will be the starting point for our yearly documentation. Let me know on Slack once it's ready so I can start adding to it.

Thanks,
Bob
